title: GregTech Tooltips
description: Adds custom tooltips for every energy tier in Gregtech using Legendary Tooltips
body:
This resourcepack (using [Eclectic Trove](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eclectic-trove-legendary-tooltips) resourcepack as a base) adds a custom tooltip for every energy tier (from LV to UV) in GregTechCEu Modern in Legendary Tooltips.
![A gif of every tooltip (so far)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71f4bc021be68583d0b993d091f24699e67ca90f.gif)

This resourcepack is also meant to be played with [GregTech: Refreshed](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gregtech-refreshed) as it uses some textures from that resourcepack.
